subject: refactor(triggers): split audit into focused triggers, add short aliases
body:
Old audit was a mega-checklist covering performance, security, and code quality.
Now split into three focused triggers (perf, sec, aud) so users can target what
they care about. Every trigger gets both a full word and a short alias.

Renamed: cleanup→clean/cln, debug-check→debug/dbg, sweep→start/go,
suggestions→improve/imp. Added: performance/perf, security/sec.

Tags: documentation, triggers, dx
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: developer-experience
Semver: patch
title: split audit into focused triggers, add short aliases
